style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. In the centre, a two-faced chess clock; the left face labelled HUMAIN, the right face labelled IA, with a small arrow showing the turn passing from one to the other. Above it, a single board step with two small tokens handing a baton back and forth, captioned TRANSFERT À L'INTÉRIEUR D'UNE ÉTAPE. To one side, a small raised-hand icon labelled LEVER LA MAIN, AUCUNE PÉNALITÉ, and below it a small stop icon labelled BLOCAGE, UNE PETITE PÉNALITÉ. A caption reads L'HORLOGE MONTRE QUI A RETENU LE TRAVAIL. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
